concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: On Page 2, the text content of the 'Phase & Quality' legend is entirely omitted from the text elements. While the legend is represented as an image, the specific data it contains (e.g., 'Phase 1 (2020) - QL 1', 'Phase 3 (2015) - QL 2') is missing. This constitutes a significant portion of the textual information on that page (over 25% of the page's discrete information units).

The entire section beginning with the agency logos, followed by the 'Project Timeline' text and Table 5, appears twice in succession. This is a genuine duplication of body content rather than a structural element like a table of contents entry.
